description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by dense, mature trees and lush landscaping, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The house features a flat roof with solar panels, large front-facing windows, and a central entrance flanked by flower beds and shrubs. The driveway leads to a parking area with two cars visible, and a paved walkway guides visitors to the main entrance. The property is enclosed by a ring of tall trees, providing natural shade and privacy. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are large, maximizing natural light. The overall setting suggests a tranquil suburban or semi-urban environment with a focus on sustainability and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, solar panels, and large windows, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, flanked by flower beds and illuminated by garden lights, with dense trees forming a natural barrier.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facade with large windows, the central entrance, and a blue car parked on the driveway, with trees encircling the property.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible, showing the driveway, two parked cars, and more of the landscaped garden and tree coverage.
description_view_3: The back of the bungalow is mostly obscured by trees, but the flat roof and some windows are visible, emphasizing the secluded nature of the property.
